nameMeanings.name: Farr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English fear(r), farre (Old English fearr) ‘steer, ox’, applied as a nickname for a fierce man or a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a bull.
German: nickname from Middle High German varne, var, with the same meaning as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Farr was born in 1685, in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Farre, was 41 and his mother, Mrs. Margaret Farre, was 31. He married Mary Perrie on 3 October 1710, in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 23 April 1762, at the age of 77, and was buried in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Farr est né en 1685, à Otterton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Farre, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Margaret Farre, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mary Perrie le 3 octobre 1710, à Otterton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1762, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Otterton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Farr 1685 in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Farre 41 und seine Mutter Mrs. Margaret Farre 31. Er hat am 3. Oktober 1710 in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Mary Perrie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1762 im Alter von 77 Jahren und wurde in Otterton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Farr è nato il nel 1685 nel Otterton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Farre, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Margaret Farre, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mary Perrie il 3 ottobre 1710, nel Otterton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1762, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Otterton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Farr(이)가 1685년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Farre(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Margaret Farre(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1710년 10월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터턴에서 Mary Perrie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1762년 4월 23일 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오터턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Farr nasceu em 1685, em Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Farre, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Margaret Farre, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Perrie em 3 de outubro de 1710, em Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1762, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Farr родился в 1685 г. в местности оттиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Farre было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Margaret Farre, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Perrie 3 октября 1710 г. в местности оттиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 23 апреля 1762 г. в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности оттиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Farr nació en 1685, en Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Farre, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mrs. Margaret Farre, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mary Perrie el 3 de octubre de 1710, en Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1762, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Otterton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
